name: loan-amount-non-cad-currency
rationale: Broker email states loan_amount in USD: 'USD $280,000'. Property in Toronto (CAD jurisdiction). F1.LA canonical-map must handle currency-tagged values. Expected behavior is UNDEFINED — possibilities: (a) reject non-CAD with validation error, (b) accept + flag for FX conversion at admin review, (c) silently treat as CAD. Layer 3 product-design item.
notes: Single-event sequence. Tests currency-tag handling; assumes Vienna's underwriting is CAD-only. Phase 4 spec needs product decision on FX support.
